status.reason_remote_dump_not_generated: Supabase CLI on this machine is not authenticated. A full remote dump still requires SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN or a local supabase login.

import_rule.behavior: If a row is imported again with the same date and time, the script must update the existing culto record instead of creating a new one. If the culto name changed, it must update id_nome_cultos to the new name.

notes: This backup folder was created before any new import automation changes.
Because the remote CLI dump is pending, this folder is a safe baseline plus the live database state summary.
